groups.name: A
groups.title: Runner invocation and worker lifecycle
groups.notes: Functional tests cover invocation paths (TestRunnerCLI, TestTargetResolution). BUG-003, BUG-008, BUG-009 affect runner behavior; covered by regression xfail tests. Full subprocess integration deferred.

groups.name: B
groups.title: Phase gate enforcement
groups.notes: BUG-003 (80 vs 120 threshold), BUG-006 (phase3 gate incomplete), BUG-016 (phase5 gate missing Phase 4 enforcement) are confirmed regression xfail tests demonstrating gate failures.

groups.name: C
groups.title: Quality gate validator
groups.notes: BUG-010, BUG-011, BUG-012, BUG-013, BUG-014 are confirmed xfail regressions. All 45 gate benchmarks covered by test_functional.py.

groups.name: D
groups.title: Cleanup and archive behavior
groups.notes: BUG-004, BUG-005, BUG-007, BUG-015 are confirmed xfail regressions. Full crash-recovery integration test deferred (requires process kill).

groups.name: E
groups.title: Functional-test filename parity in quality_gate.py
groups.notes: BUG-024 and BUG-025 are confirmed xfail regressions. The gate's file-existence and extension-check paths enforce narrower filename matrices than the helper library and the documented naming guidance.

groups.name: F
groups.title: Helper artifact reporting stays canonical
groups.notes: BUG-026 and BUG-027 are confirmed xfail regressions. The helper library currently over-accepts undocumented functional aliases and non-canonical regression aliases, so runner gap reports and artifact summaries can overstate conformance.
